title: NeosSurvivalPlus
description:
Better gameplay, better biomes, more content. THIS is minecraft!
We return...
body:
![TITLE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee29f6d594a1d5b3a83a21d14b22900d635dce9f.png)

The NeoSurvivalPlus modpack adds a load of the best optimization mods, world generation mods and mods that just fit.

This modpack aims to allow people to get the best gameplay and enjoyment when playing.

I made this to show the power of mods and allow people to play survival and/or hardcore worlds with better terrain and more structures!

We are returning.
